title: Eliminate tools regenerate target and embed store schemas
description:
The 'tools' regeneration target was always a misnomer — it only copied JSON schemas to .forge/schemas/. Tools ship with the plugin and never needed per-project regeneration. This task removes the target entirely and makes validate-store self-contained by embedding schemas internally.

Changes required:
1. forge/tools/validate-store.cjs — promote the existing FALLBACK field lists to full embedded JSON Schema objects (matching the blocks in forge/meta/store-schema/*.md); remove loadSchema(), schemasPath, and all .forge/schemas/ file reads. The tool must work without .forge/schemas/ present.
2. forge/commands/init.md — remove Phase 8 (schema copy to .forge/schemas/). Document that validate-store embeds its own schemas.
3. forge/commands/regenerate.md — remove the 'tools' category section entirely.
4. forge/commands/update.md — remove all references to 'tools' in regeneration descriptions (Step 4 summary, Step 2A 'After install, Forge will regenerate' list, Step 6 summary).
5. forge/meta/store-schema/*.md — remove the 'JSON Schema' section header that says 'emitted verbatim to .forge/schemas/ during init'. Reframe each file's intro as a design document. The JSON blocks remain as reference but no longer imply they are extraction sources.
